$schema: Golden test set for Climate RAG retrieval evaluation
description: Auto-annotated golden queries with real Qdrant chunk IDs. Generated by scripts/annotate_golden_queries.py. 52 queries across 6 categories.

queries.query: What is the global mean temperature anomaly for 2023?
How does annual precipitation vary across Central Europe?
What are the mean sea level pressure trends in the North Atlantic?
What wind speed data is available for offshore wind energy assessment?
How has relative humidity changed over the past decades?
What drought index datasets are available for monitoring agricultural drought?
What solar radiation data is available for climate modelling?
What snow cover and snow depth datasets exist for Alpine regions?
What sea surface temperature data is available for the Mediterranean?
What evapotranspiration data is available for water balance studies?
What climate datasets cover the Czech Republic?
What temperature data is available for the Mediterranean basin?
queries.notes: Regional spatial query with variable filter

queries.notes: Sub-regional spatial query with variable filter
